title: Web Server, Middleware & Routers

classes.name: WebServerService
static_fields: MODULES: object (https, http, fs, express, helmet, cookieParser, compression, on-finished, morgan)
methods: _init(): Promise<void>  // creates express app, installs all global middleware
__on_boot.consolidation(): Promise<void>  // installs route middlewares, routes via events
__on_start.webserver(): Promise<void>  // binds HTTP port, sets up socket.io auth

classes.name: eggspress
classes.description: Creates an express.Router with declarative middleware pipeline from settings object
classes.signature: eggspress(route: string|RegExp|Array, settings: EggspressSettings, handler: RequestHandler): express.Router
settings_flags: subdomain: string  → runs subdomain-check middleware first
auth: boolean      → injects auth middleware (UserActorType only)
multest: boolean   → injects multest multipart parser

classes.name: configurable_auth
classes.signature: configurable_auth(options: { optional?: boolean, no_options_auth?: boolean, allow_cached_user?: boolean }): AsyncRequestHandler
classes.description: Core auth middleware. Extracts token from body/Authorization header/cookie/query/socket, delegates to AuthService, populates req.actor and req.user

classes.name: auth
classes.description: Wrapper around auth2 that additionally enforces UserActorType. Delegates to auth2, throws forbidden if actor is not a user session.

classes.name: auth2
classes.description: Instance of configurable_auth({ optional: false }). General-purpose auth, accepts any Actor type.

classes.name: measure
classes.description: Intercepts req/res streams to track sz_incoming and sz_outgoing bytes. Resolves req.measurements TeePromise on response finish.

classes.name: anticsrf
classes.description: Validates req.body.anti_csrf token via svc_antiCSRF.consume_token(req.user.uuid, token). Returns 400 APIError on failure.

classes.name: subdomain
classes.description: Skips route (next('route')) if request subdomain does not match allowed list.

classes.name: abuse
classes.description: Checks Context requester.is_bot and requester.is_puter_origin(). Throws forbidden or calls shadow_ban_responder.

classes.name: verified
classes.description: Checks req.user.email_confirmed when strict_email_verification_required is set. Returns 400 if not verified.

classes.name: ContextExpressMiddleware
classes.description: Installs a Context sub-context on every request for dependency injection (services, actor, user). Wraps req lifecycle.

classes.name: FilesystemAPIRouterGroup
classes.description: All routes use eggspress with { subdomain: 'api', auth2: true, verified: true } unless noted

classes.name: KVStoreRouterGroup
classes.description: Traditional express.Router with auth middleware; calls svc_driver 'puter-kvstore' with fallback to direct DB

classes.name: HostingRouterGroup
routes: GET /* (static_hosting_domain) → puterSiteMiddleware: resolves site owner, serves files via LLRead from filesystem

key_relationships: WebServerService uses measure() middleware (data transfer tracking)
WebServerService uses morgan (HTTP logging via log-service)
WebServerService emits install.middlewares.early/context-aware/install.routes via services event bus
WebServerService sets up socket.io auth via jwt_auth/AuthService
eggspress factory composes middleware chain: subdomain → abuse → verified → json → auth/auth2 → files → parameters → handler
AuthRouterGroup uses eggspress with auth2=true on 'api' subdomain
FilesystemAPIRouterGroup uses eggspress with auth2=true, verified=true on 'api' subdomain
KVStoreRouterGroup uses express.Router with auth middleware
HostingRouterGroup uses puterSiteMiddleware (ESM) serving static files from filesystem
middleware_pipeline_order: 3. QR-code auth_token query → set HTTP-only session cookie
9. Host header validation (allowed domains, custom domains)
important_notes: eggspress is the central route factory — all modern routes (auth, fs, ai) use it; KVStore uses legacy express.Router
auth enforces UserActorType only (session tokens); auth2/configurable_auth accepts any Actor (users, apps, access tokens)
router_webhooks is a special pre-JSON-parse router for webhook signature verification
Graceful shutdown: SIGTERM/SIGINT → 15s ALB failover delay → closeIdleConnections → server.close → 110s force-exit timer
puterSiteMiddleware is ESM (.mjs) serving static hosting from puter filesystem; resolves site by subdomain or custom domain
PuterAI chat_completions registers allow_undefined_origin for its route to permit cross-origin AI API calls
configurable_auth handles legacy token migration at /whoami endpoint (LegacyTokenError → check_session)
